{{Infobox group
| name = Dragon Army
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Dragon Army Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Dragon Army was a specialized force of twelve humans trained by [[Valin]] to harness the unique powers of the [[Territory]] of [[Valinhall]]. Originally established to combat the tyranny of [[Damasca]] and destroy its kingdom, the group served as a powerful ally in the past. Unlike other [[Travelers]], members of this army do not summon external powers but instead draw strength into themselves to win battles. Each original soldier was gifted a [[Dragon's Fang]], which were specialized weapons forged by the Wanderer that serve as keys to [[the House]]. The army is currently broken and scattered. Following a period where [[Valin]] slaughtered most of his own followers, only a few members remained; some survived because they were deemed worthy by the [[Incarnation]], while others fell in combat against the Wanderer. At present, the group is largely defunct, with only four of the thirteen Dragon's Fangs actively in use. The remaining blades are either lost within other worlds or intentionally sealed away. While some view the Dragon Army as a group primarily dedicated to killing other [[Travelers]], others see them as a force capable of restoration if their lost weapons are recovered and redistributed to worthy individuals.}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Dragon Army]] is a group of [[Travelers]] that is distinct from other [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9">''House of Blades'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The graduation ritual is the final challenge for the [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] is a member of the [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22">''House of Blades'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Founded by [[Valin]], the Dragon Army was once a powerful ally that stood in opposition to [[Damasca]]. The group is composed of [[Valinhall Travelers]] who are notorious for murdering their own kind, including members such as [[Kai]] and [[Denner]]. Following the death of [[King Zakareth the Fifth]], the army was broken and now finds itself in need of new blood. While they were once a formidable force, [[Naraka]] would find satisfaction in seeing the group finally receive what they deserve.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Dragon Army]] needs new blood.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Dragon Army]] was broken after the death of [[King Zakareth the Fifth]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Dragon Army]] consists of [[Valinhall Travelers]] who are known for murdering other [[Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Dragon Army]] was once a strong ally.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Dragon Army]] is a group [[Naraka]] would relish seeing get what it deserved.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Dragon Army]] once opposed [[Damasca]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Valin]] is the founder of the [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is a member of the [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Denner]] and [[Kai]] are members of the [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Students such as [[Kai]] and [[Valin]] comprise the ranks of the Dragon Army. For months or even years, many members struggled to pass the test within a specific room, and numerous individuals never managed to earn ghost armor. During the conflict, [[Indirial]] was assigned the task of disarming the group. Following the events where two members stepped into [[Valinhall]], the last remaining soldier of the Dragon Army abandoned her [[Territory]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Many of the [[Dragon Army]] failed to pass the test of a specific room for months or years.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Many members of the [[Dragon Army]] never earned ghost armor.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] and [[Valin]] are students of the [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] was tasked with disarming the [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Two members of the [[Dragon Army]] stepped into [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The last soldier of the [[Dragon Army]] has abandoned her [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Your pardon, Eliadel, but I have crossed Travelers of Valinhall in the past. They call themselves the Dragon Army, and as far as I can tell, their only purpose is to murder other Travelers.”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
